sourceTitle: NTU Policy on the Use of Generative Artificial Intelligence in Research
evidenceSnippetOriginal: GenAI (e.g. ChatGPT) should not be listed as an author of any paper with an affiliation to NTU; or listed as a Principal Investigator (PI), Co-PI, or collaborator in any research proposals.
